mapper.select: SELECT a.AUC_SN AS auctionId, p.PRD_SN AS productId, p.USR_SN AS sellerId, a.AUC_STATUS_CD AS auctionStatusCode, highest.BID_SN AS highestBidId, highest.USR_SN AS highestBidderId FROM AUCTION a JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = a.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BID_SN, AUC_SN, USR_SN FROM BID WHERE AUC_SN = #{auctionId} AND BID_STATUS_CD = 'BIDC0001' ORDER BY BID_AMT DESC, BID_REG_DT DESC, BID_SN DESC LIMIT 1 ) highest ON highest.AUC_SN = a.AUC_SN WHERE a.AUC_SN = #{auctionId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT a.AUC_SN AS auctionId, p.PRD_SN AS productId, p.USR_SN AS sellerId, a.AUC_STATUS_CD AS auctionStatusCode, highest.BID_SN AS highestBidId, highest.USR_SN AS highestBidderId FROM AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST r JOIN AUCTION a ON a.AUC_SN = r.AUC_SN JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = a.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.BID_SN, b.AUC_SN, b.USR_SN FROM BID b JOIN AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST req ON req.AUC_SN = b.AUC_SN AND req.AUC_CNL_REQ_SN = #{cancelRequestSn} WHERE b.BID_STATUS_CD = 'BIDC0001' ORDER BY b.BID_AMT DESC, b.BID_REG_DT DESC, b.BID_SN DESC LIMIT 1 ) highest ON highest.AUC_SN = a.AUC_SN WHERE r.AUC_CNL_REQ_SN = #{cancelRequestSn} FOR UPDATE

SELECT AUC_CNL_REQ_SN AS cancelRequestSn, AUC_SN AS auctionId, REQ_USR_SN AS requesterUserId, AUC_CNL_REQ_RSN_CN AS reason, AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN AS approvalYn, PROC_USR_SN AS processorUserId, AUC_CNL_REQ_PROC_RSN_CN AS processReason, AUC_CNL_REQ_PROC_DT AS processDateTime FROM AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST WHERE AUC_CNL_REQ_SN = #{cancelRequestSn} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST WHERE AUC_SN = #{auctionId} AND AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST ( AUC_SN, REQ_USR_SN, AUC_CNL_REQ_RSN_CN, AUC_CNL_REQ_REG_ID, AUC_CNL_REQ_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{auctionId}, #{requesterUserId}, #{reason}, #{actor}, #{actor} )
mapper.update: UPDATE AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST SET AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN = 'Y', PROC_USR_SN = #{adminUserId}, AUC_CNL_REQ_PROC_RSN_CN = #{processReason}, AUC_CNL_REQ_PROC_DT = NOW(), AUC_CNL_REQ_UPDT_ID = #{actor}, AUC_CNL_REQ_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE AUC_CNL_REQ_SN = #{cancelRequestSn} AND AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN IS NULL

UPDATE AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST SET AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN = 'N', PROC_USR_SN = #{adminUserId}, AUC_CNL_REQ_PROC_RSN_CN = #{rejectReason}, AUC_CNL_REQ_PROC_DT = NOW(), AUC_CNL_REQ_UPDT_ID = #{actor}, AUC_CNL_REQ_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE AUC_CNL_REQ_SN = #{cancelRequestSn} AND AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN IS NULL
